/- The result follows from the property of the prime factorization.
     The exponent of a prime p in k! is given by Legendre's formula: E_p(k!) = \sum_{i=1}^∞ floor(k/p^i).
     Thus, it's sufficient to show that for any prime p and integer d = p^i:
     floor(m/d) + floor(n/d) + floor((m+n)/d) ≤ floor(2m/d) + floor(2n/d).
     Letting u = m/d and v = n/d, the inequality becomes ⌊u⌋ + ⌊v⌋ + ⌊u+v⌋ ≤ ⌊2u⌋ + ⌊2v⌋.
     Let u = ⌊u⌋ + {u} and v = ⌊v⌋ + {v}, where 0 ≤ {u}, {v} < 1.
     The inequality reduces to ⌊{u} + {v}⌋ ≤ ⌊2{u}⌋ + ⌊2{v}⌋.
     This inequality holds because:
     - If {u} < 1/2 and {v} < 1/2, then 0 ≤ 0 + 0.
     - If {u} ≥ 1/2 or {v} ≥ 1/2, the right side is at least 1, and ⌊{u} + {v}⌋ is at most 1. -/

  intro p hp k
  if hk : k = 0 then simp [hk] else
  rw [Nat.pow_dvd_iff_le_multiplicity (Nat.Prime.ne_zero hp), Nat.multiplicity_mul hp,
    Nat.multiplicity_mul hp, Nat.multiplicity_mul hp, Nat.multiplicity_factorial,
    Nat.multiplicity_factorial, Nat.multiplicity_factorial, Nat.multiplicity_factorial,
    Nat.multiplicity_factorial]
  refine (Nat.sum_add_distrib.symm.trans (Nat.sum_add_distrib.symm.trans ?_)).le
  refine Nat.sum_le_sum (λ i _ => ?_)
  simp only
  generalize (p ^ (i + 1)) = d
  have hd : d > 0 := Nat.pos_of_gt (Nat.one_lt_pow (by omega) (by simp))
  have h1 : m / d + n / d + (m + n) / d ≤ 2 * m / d + 2 * n / d := by
    calc m / d + n / d + (m + n) / d
      _ = m / d + n / d + (m / d + n / d + (m % d + n % d) / d) := by rw [Nat.add_div m n hd]
      _ ≤ 2 * m / d + 2 * n / d := by
        have h_2m : 2 * m / d = 2 * (m / d) + 2 * (m % d) / d := by rw [Nat.mul_div_assoc 2 hd, Nat.add_div]
        have h_2n : 2 * n / d = 2 * (n / d) + 2 * (n % d) / d := by rw [Nat.mul_div_assoc 2 hd, Nat.add_div]
        rw [h_2m, h_2n]

    · intro i _ hin; simp [Nat.div_eq_zero_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt hk (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right hp.one_lt (by simpa using hin)))]
  simp [Nat.padicValNat_mul hp (by positivity), h_sum m (by linarith), h_sum n (by linarith), h_sum (m + n) (by linarith), h_sum (2 * m) (by linarith), h_sum (2 * n) (by linarith), ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  apply Finset.sum_le_sum
  intro i _
  set d := p ^ i; have h_pos : d > 0 := by positivity
  have h_div a b : (a + b) / d = a / d + b / d + (a % d + b % d) / d := by
    rw [← Nat.div_add_mod a d, ← Nat.div_add_mod b d, Nat.add_add_add_comm, Nat.mul_add_div _ _ _ h_pos]; simp [Nat.mul_comm]
  rw [h_div m n, h_div m m, h_div n n, ← mul_two, ← mul_two]
  if h : m % d + n % d < d then simp [Nat.div_eq_zero_of_lt h, Nat.zero_le]
  else
    have h1 : (m % d + n % d) / d = 1 := Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le (Nat.le_of_not_lt h) (by linarith [Nat.mod_lt m h_pos, Nat.mod_lt n h_pos])
    have h2 : 1 ≤ 2 * (m % d) / d ∨ 1 ≤ 2 * (n % d) / d := by
      rw [Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le h_pos, Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le h_pos]; linarith [Nat.le_of_not_lt h]
    linarith

refine Nat.dvd_of_forall_padicValNat_le (by positivity) (by positivity) (fun p hp => ?_)
  simp [Nat.padicValNat_mul hp, Nat.padicValNat_factorial hp]
  refine Nat.sum_le_sum (fun i _ => ?_)
  generalize p ^ i.succ = q
  have hq : 0 < q := Nat.pos_of_pow_pos i.succ hp.pos
  have hrm : m % q < q := Nat.mod_lt m hq
  have hrn : n % q < q := Nat.mod_lt n hq
  have h1 := Nat.add_div m n hq
  have h2 := Nat.add_div m m hq
  have h3 := Nat.add_div n n hq
  generalize m % q = rm at *
  generalize n % q = rn at *
  cases' Nat.lt_or_ge (rm + rn) q with h h
  · rw [Nat.div_eq_zero h] at h1; rw [h1, h2, h3, ← two_mul, ← two_mul]; linarith
  · have : q ≤ 2 * rm ∨ q ≤ 2 * rn := by linarith
    have h1' : (rm + rn) / q = 1 := Nat.div_eq_one h (by linarith)
    cases' this with h' h'
    · have h2' : (2 * rm) / q = 1 := Nat.div_eq_one h' (by linarith)
      rw [h1', h2', h2, h3, h1, ← two_mul, ← two_mul] at *; linarith
    · have h3' : (2 * rn) / q = 1 := Nat.div_eq_one h' (by linarith)
      rw [h1', h3', h2, h3, h1, ← two_mul, ← two_mul] at *; linarith

apply Nat.dvd_of_multiplicity_le
  intro p hp
  rw [multiplicity.mul hp, multiplicity.mul hp, Nat.multiplicity_factorial_prime hp,
    Nat.multiplicity_factorial_prime hp, Nat.multiplicity_factorial_prime hp,
    Nat.multiplicity_factorial_prime hp, Nat.multiplicity_factorial_prime hp]
  let N := 2 * m + 2 * n + 1
  have h_sum (k : ℕ) (hk : k < N) :
      (∑ i in Finset.Ico 1 (k + 1), k / p ^ i) = ∑ i in Finset.Ico 1 N, k / p ^ i := by
    refine Finset.sum_subset (Finset.Ico_subset_Ico (Nat.le_refl _) hk.le) (fun i _ hi ↦ ?_)
    apply Nat.div_eq_zero (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hk (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right hp.pos (Finset.mem_Ico.1 hi).1))
  rw [h_sum m (by linarith), h_sum n (by linarith), h_sum (m + n) (by linarith),
    h_sum (2 * m) (by linarith), h_sum (2 * n) (by linarith), ← Finset.sum_add_distrib, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  refine Finset.sum_le_sum (fun i _ ↦ ?_)
  let d := p ^ i
  rw [Nat.add_div m n d, Nat.two_mul m, Nat.two_mul n, Nat.add_div m m d, Nat.add_div n n d]
  have : (m % d + n % d) / d ≤ (m % d + m % d) / d + (n % d + n % d) / d := by
    by_cases h : m % d + n % d < d
    · rw [Nat.div_eq_zero h]; apply Nat.zero_le
    · have : d ≤ 2 * (m % d) ∨ d ≤ 2 * (n % d) := by linarith [Nat.mod_lt m (Nat.pos_pow_of_pos i hp.pos), Nat.mod_lt n (Nat.pos_pow_of_pos i hp.pos)]
      have h1 : 1 ≤ (m % d + m % d) / d + (n % d + n % d) / d := by
        cases this with | inl h => exact Nat.le_add_right (h.trans_eq (Nat.two_mul _).symm ▸ Nat.div_self (Nat.pos_pow_of_pos i hp.pos)).symm.le _
                         | inr h => exact Nat.le_add_left (h.trans_eq (Nat.two_mul _).symm ▸ Nat.div_self (Nat.pos_pow_of_pos i hp.pos)).symm.le _
      exact h1.trans_le' (Nat.div_le_of_le_mul (by linarith [Nat.mod_lt m (Nat.pos_pow_of_pos i hp.pos), Nat.mod_lt n (Nat.pos_pow_of_pos i hp.pos)]))
  linarith

rw [Nat.dvd_iff_multiplicity_le_multiplicity]
  intro p hp
  rw [hp.multiplicity_mul, hp.multiplicity_mul, Nat.multiplicity_factorial hp,
      Nat.multiplicity_factorial hp, Nat.multiplicity_factorial hp,
      Nat.multiplicity_factorial hp, Nat.multiplicity_factorial hp]
  rw [← Finset.sum_add_distrib, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  apply Finset.sum_le_sum
  intro i _
  let k := p ^ i
  have hk : k > 0 := Nat.pos_pow_of_pos i hp.pos
  have h_mul (a : ℕ) : (2 * a) / k = (2 * (a % k)) / k + 2 * (a / k) := by
    rw [← Nat.add_mul_div_left _ _ hk, Nat.mul_comm (a / k), ← Nat.add_assoc,
        Nat.mul_comm 2, Nat.mul_add, Nat.mul_comm _ a, Nat.mod_add_div]
  rw [h_mul m, h_mul n, Nat.add_div m n k, add_assoc, add_comm (2 * (m / k)), ← add_assoc,
      add_assoc (m / k), add_comm (n / k), ← add_assoc, Nat.add_mul, one_mul]
  apply Nat.add_le_add (Nat.le_refl _)
  let r1 := m % k; let r2 := n % k
  by_cases h : r1 + r2 < k
  · rw [Nat.div_eq_zero h]; exact Nat.zero_le _
  · rw [Nat.div_eq_one (Nat.le_of_not_lt h) (by linarith [Nat.mod_lt m hk, Nat.mod_lt n hk])]
    have : k ≤ 2 * r1 ∨ k ≤ 2 * r2 := by linarith [Nat.le_of_not_lt h]
    cases this with
    | inl h1 => exact Nat.le_add_right (Nat.div_eq_one h1 (by linarith [Nat.mod_lt m hk])) _
    | inr h2 => exact Nat.le_add_left (Nat.div_eq_one h2 (by linarith [Nat.mod_lt n hk])) _

apply Nat.dvd_of_forall_prime_pow_dvd (by simp) (by simp)
  intro p hp
  simp [Nat.factorial_prime_pow_count_eq_sum_div hp, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  refine Finset.sum_le_sum (fun k _ ↦ ?_)
  let d := p ^ k
  rw [Nat.add_div m n d, ← Nat.mul_div_assoc m (by omega), ← Nat.mul_div_assoc n (by omega)]
  rw [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm (m / d + n / d), ← Nat.add_assoc]
  refine Nat.add_le_add (Nat.add_le_add (by omega) (by omega)) ?_
  let rm := m % d
  let rn := n % d
  have hrm : rm < d := Nat.mod_lt m (by apply Nat.pow_pos; exact Nat.Prime.pos hp)
  have hrn : rn < d := Nat.mod_lt n (by apply Nat.pow_pos; exact Nat.Prime.pos hp)
  by_cases h : rm + rn < d
  · rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt h]
    omega
  · have : (rm + rn) / d = 1 := by
      refine Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le (by omega) (by omega)
    rw [this]
    have : 1 ≤ 2 * rm / d + 2 * rn / d := by
      by_cases hm : 2 * rm < d
      · have : 2 * rn ≥ d := by omega
        have : 2 * rn / d ≥ 1 := Nat.le_div_of_mul_le (by omega) (by omega)
        omega
      · have : 2 * rm / d ≥ 1 := Nat.le_div_of_mul_le (by omega) (by omega)
        omega
    exact this

apply Nat.dvd_of_valuation_le (by positivity) (by positivity)
  intro p hp
  rw [Nat.valuation_mul hp (by positivity) (by positivity),
      Nat.valuation_mul hp (by positivity) (by positivity),
      Nat.valuation_mul hp (by positivity) (by positivity)]
  repeat rw [Nat.valuation_factorial hp]
  let k := 2 * m + 2 * n
  let f x i := x / p ^ (i + 1)
  have h_sum x (hx : x ≤ k) : x.factorial.valuation p = ∑ i in Finset.range k, f x i := by
    rw [Nat.valuation_factorial hp, Finset.sum_range_add x (k - x)]
    refine (add_zero _).symm.trans (congr_arg (∑ i in Finset.range x, f x i + ·) ?_)
    apply Finset.sum_eq_zero
    intro i _; apply Nat.div_eq_zero
    exact x.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right hp.one_lt (Nat.le_add_left (x + 1) i) |> hx.trans_lt)
  repeat rw [h_sum _ (by linarith)]
  rw [← Finset.sum_add_distrib, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  apply Finset.sum_le_sum
  intro i _
  set d := p ^ (i + 1)
  have hd : d > 0 := Nat.pow_pos hp.pos (i + 1)
  let r1 := m % d; let r2 := n % d
  rw [Nat.div_add_mod m d, Nat.div_add_mod n d, (by ring : 2*m = 2*(m/d)*d + 2*r1), (by ring : 2*n = 2*(n/d)*d + 2*r2), (by ring : m+n = (m/d+n/d)*d + (r1+r2))]
  repeat rw [Nat.add_mul_div_left _ _ hd]
  simp only [add_assoc, add_le_add_iff_left]
  rw [add_comm (m/d), add_assoc, add_le_add_iff_left]
  by_cases h : r1 + r2 < d
  · rw [Nat.div_eq_zero h]; exact Nat.zero_le _
  · have : 1 ≤ (2 * r1) / d + (2 * r2) / d := by
      have : d ≤ 2 * r1 ∨ d ≤ 2 * r2 := by linarith [Nat.le_of_not_lt h]
      cases this with | inl h => exact le_trans (Nat.div_le_div_right h) (Nat.le_add_right _ _)
                       | inr h => exact le_trans (Nat.div_le_div_right h) (Nat.le_add_left _ _)
    rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le (Nat.le_of_not_lt h) (by linarith [Nat.mod_lt m hd, Nat.mod_lt n hd])]; exact this

let rec c : ℕ → ℕ → ℤ
    | 0, n => (2 * n).choose n
    | m + 1, n => 4 * c m n - c m (n + 1)
  have h (m n : ℕ) : (c m n : ℚ) = (2 * m).factorial * (2 * n).factorial / (m.factorial * n.factorial * (m + n).factorial) := by
    induction m generalizing n with
    | zero =>
      simp [c, Nat.choose_eq_factorial_div_factorial, Nat.cast_div, Nat.factorial_mul_factorial_dvd_factorial_add, Nat.factorial_ne_zero]
    | succ m ih =>
      simp [c, ih, Nat.factorial_succ, ← Nat.mul_assoc]
      field_simp [Nat.factorial_ne_zero]
      ring
  apply Nat.cast_dvd_cast.1
  use c m n
  have h1 := h m n
  field_simp [Nat.factorial_ne_zero] at h1
  norm_cast at h1
  exact h1.symm

apply Nat.dvd_of_forall_prime_multiplicity_le
  intro p hp
  simp only [Nat.multiplicity_mul hp, Nat.multiplicity_factorial_prime_eq_sum_div_pow hp]
  set K := 2 * m + 2 * n + 1
  have h_sum (x : ℕ) (hx : x < K) : multiplicity p x ! = (∑ k in Finset.Ico 1 K, x / p ^ k : ℕ) := by
    rw [Nat.multiplicity_factorial_prime_eq_sum_div_pow hp]
    refine (Finset.sum_subset (Finset.Ico_subset_Ico (by simp) (by linarith)) ?_).symm
    intro k hk₁ hk₂
    have : p ^ k > x := by
      apply Nat.one_lt_pow k x hp.one_lt
      exact (Finset.mem_Ico.1 hk₂).1
    simp [this]
  simp only [h_sum m (by linarith), h_sum n (by linarith), h_sum (m + n) (by linarith),
    h_sum (2 * m) (by linarith), h_sum (2 * n) (by linarith), PartENat.coe_le_coe, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  apply Finset.sum_le_sum
  intro k _
  set d := p ^ k
  have : (m + n) / d = m / d + n / d + (m % d + n % d) / d := Nat.add_div m n d
  have h2m : 2 * m / d = 2 * (m / d) + (2 * (m % d)) / d := Nat.mul_div 2 m d
  have h2n : 2 * n / d = 2 * (n / d) + (2 * (n % d)) / d := Nat.mul_div 2 n d
  rw [this, h2m, h2n]
  linarith [Nat.div_le_div_right (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 (Nat.le_add_right (m % d) (n % d))) d,
    Nat.add_div (2 * (m % d)) (2 * (n % d)) d]
